assertionResults.fullName: Phase 1 SVG completion generates stable Puck field definitions from validated metadata
assertionResults.title: generates stable Puck field definitions from validated metadata

assertionResults.fullName: Phase 1 SVG completion validates fixed, configurable, and parametric reference definitions
assertionResults.title: validates fixed, configurable, and parametric reference definitions

assertionResults.fullName: Phase 1 SVG completion returns sorted deterministic diagnostics for broken references
assertionResults.title: returns sorted deterministic diagnostics for broken references

assertionResults.fullName: Phase 1 SVG completion renders canonical PNG and deterministic Sharp derivatives
assertionResults.title: renders canonical PNG and deterministic Sharp derivatives

assertionResults.fullName: Phase 1 SVG completion publishes once, rejects mutation, and reloads the existing version
assertionResults.title: publishes once, rejects mutation, and reloads the existing version

assertionResults.fullName: Phase 1 SVG completion compileSvgBlockV1 is deterministic for reference fixtures (svg + checksums match)
assertionResults.title: compileSvgBlockV1 is deterministic for reference fixtures (svg + checksums match)

assertionResults.fullName: Phase 1 SVG completion enforces full geometry validation on reference fixtures (parts inside viewBox, valid primitives)
assertionResults.title: enforces full geometry validation on reference fixtures (parts inside viewBox, valid primitives)

assertionResults.fullName: Phase 1 SVG completion enforces constraint validation on parametric reference (e.g. shelves max)
assertionResults.title: enforces constraint validation on parametric reference (e.g. shelves max)

assertionResults.fullName: Phase 1 SVG completion locks and uses SVGO plugin configuration (integration)
assertionResults.title: locks and uses SVGO plugin configuration (integration)

assertionResults.fullName: Phase 1 SVG completion rejects malicious input (script, js href) via canonical sanitize in compiler path
assertionResults.title: rejects malicious input (script, js href) via canonical sanitize in compiler path

assertionResults.fullName: Phase 1 SVG completion full end-to-end: admin draft/preview (V1 compile), publish/revision (disk via persist), planner 2D placement (resolver), thumb png, reload for fixed+configurable+parametric refs
assertionResults.title: full end-to-end: admin draft/preview (V1 compile), publish/revision (disk via persist), planner 2D placement (resolver), thumb png, reload for fixed+configurable+parametric refs
